script: The morning version of you should never have to decide what to work on.

props.quote: The morning version of you should never have to decide what to work on.

script: exactly three priorities, written tonight — is what makes it work

props.headline: The constraint is the whole habit

cards.definition: Forces real prioritization — you have to choose
You still have context; morning-you decides cold

script: Five is too many; you don't have to choose. Ten is a task list, not a priority list.

props.title: Why three, not five or ten

tips.headline: That's a task list, not priorities

script: I sat down at my desk, opened my notebook, and started working within minutes

props.headline: Sat down. Started working within minutes.

script: spending twenty minutes deciding what deserved attention first
The work began before doubt had a chance to join the conversation.

props.quote: The work began before doubt had a chance to join the conversation.
